title: Global Gamerules (Neoforge)
description: This project enables you to set gamerules on a config level
body:
This mod lets you set gamerules, your world's difficulty as well as commands that are executed when you join a world.

This mod also has the capability of locking your world's difficulty. But keep in mind that this is not reversible.

This Mod is a Neoforge port / rewrite of "[Global GameRules](https://modrinth.com/mod/global-gamerules)" by [GoryMoon](https://modrinth.com/user/GoryMoon)
